'''Rehn VII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Rehn system/Legends|Rehn system]] of [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]], situated in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The world was capable of [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] production and had manufacturing capabilities.<ref name="FBS" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Rehn system was one of four [[Star system/Legends|systems]] heavily restricted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as it was the location of an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] staging zone. Despite the increased security, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] established a [[listening post]] on the planet to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on Imperial activities in the staging area.<ref name="FBS" />
